capabilities.description: Delegates movie and series fulfillment to a Wisp server's HTTP API.

fields.label: Wisp URL
fields.description: Base URL of the Wisp server. Example: http://wisp:8080

fields.label: Wisp Token
fields.description: Optional token. When set it is sent to Wisp as an Authorization: Bearer header. Leave empty if Wisp requires no authentication.

presentation.summary: Thin Silo request router that delegates all movie and series fulfillment to a Wisp server.
presentation.descriptionMarkdown: A purpose-built request_router.v1 shim. Every request Silo routes here is handed to a Wisp server over its stable HTTP API (`POST /api/add`); Wisp owns all resolution, quality pinning, and status. The plugin holds no business logic and never blocks: it makes a single fast HTTP call and returns.
presentation.setup_markdown: Install the plugin, then add a connection under Admin -> Plugins -> Wisp and set the Wisp URL (e.g. http://wisp:8080). Use Test Connection to confirm reachability.
